info.title: Oracle Integration Cloud REST API
info.description: REST API for Oracle Integration Cloud, providing endpoints for managing integrations, connections, lookups, packages, monitoring, B2B documents, trading partners, process definitions, process instances, tasks, and decision models.

get.description: Retrieve a specific connection by ID.

put.summary: Perform an action on a task

BasicAuth.description: HTTP Basic Authentication using Oracle Integration Cloud credentials.

Limit.name: limit
Limit.description: Maximum number of items to return.

Offset.name: offset
Offset.description: Index of first item to return.

action.description: Action to perform (e.g., APPROVE, REJECT, REASSIGN).
